missions.briefing: Captain, the situation is apalling. The Supreme Headquarters refused to provide us with the satellite support. So we must make a lodgement at the territory and gather maximum information about the situation in the region. You'll be heading the reconnaisance group. Get to Pucallpa and question the civilians. Most probably, they support the rebels, so you should approach them with utmost caution and keep in touch. In the meantime we will deploy the base and will be waiting for your report.
objectives: - Build the base, be ready for the rebels' assaults
- Wait for the report of the reconnaisance group.
dialog_before: The year 2038. For 20 years, the Earth has been under the rule of the Global Confederation that united and brought under its control all the countries and continents. The mankind entered a new era. Global territory wars that had been waged for a century subsided. The world economy no longer supported the military machine to be ready for action and turned towards the progress. The new scientific horizons on the Earth and in outer space were open.

But peace and quite in the Confederation is being increasingly disturbed by the outbreaks of rebellions of those who oppose the Senat's policies. The resistance movement is gaining momentum all over the world. The Senate throws the whole reserve of Confederation's scarce peace-keeping forces to suppress the rebellion.

In the east of Peru, near the city of Pucallpa, some signs of rebellious activity have been observed. Prior to that moment, South America was the calmest of regions. Your mission is to crush the revolt in Peru and to capture the leader of the rebellion.
General, senator Seiler is on the line.
Ok. Put him through.
Greeting, General. Senat appointed me in charge of the Peru operation and you're expected to concert all your actions with me.
You should have contacted me an hour ago. What's the delay? Report the situation!

Getting to the designated place was difficult due to adverse weather conditions. It's the end of rain season - all roads have been washed out. We've started to deploy the base. We are getting prepared for the offensive and expecting the intelligence summary with the satellite images of the region and further directions from the Supreme Headquarters.

General, you know that the current situation is serious. All Confederation forces have been marshaled to put down the mass revolt in the Middle East. All flash spotting satellites are employed in that conflict. The Supreme Headquarters can't supply you with the information you need. You'll have to act and do reconnaissance on your own.

Senator, will you explain to the millitary command that Peru is sprawled over hundreds of kilometers of impenetrable jungle and mountains! Conducting operations here without any support of the Space Control Center is suicidal! We're waiting for the intelligence summary. Out!
Natalie, put me through to captain Rogers.
Captain Rogers speaking!
dialog_after: Captain is calling. An urgent message!
Put me through now.

General, we were unable to get into the city. Patrols of the rebels are everywhere, all entrances to the city are being guarded. We're under fire! Retreat to the base! We're being followed. Be ready to meet us! Over.

missions.briefing: General, we were unable to get into the city. Patrols of the rebels are everywhere, all entrances to the city are being guarded. We're under fire! Retreat to the base! We're being followed. Be ready to meet us! Over.
dialog_before: Captain is calling. An urgent message!
Put me through now.
dialog_after: The city defence is impenetrable. But we managed to get some information in the nearby village. Twenty kilometers North of Pucallpa, on the bank of River Ucayali, we found a large camp of rebels. Along the river, the city supplies the rebels with everything necessary: foodstuffs, new fighters, raw materials for hardware manufacture. Local population is hostile to the Confederation army. We cannot rely on them for cooperation in fighting the rebels.
Can we cut the camp off the city and the source of supply?
No, its impossible because this bank of the river is covered with impenetrable jungle. After the rainy season it has turned into a swamp.
The rebels now know about our presence. We must not allow them time to mobilize forces. We should strike a blow right away. After the base has been wiped out we will be able to set the city free.

I will help you to use the controls in this game. On the upper panel you can see the number of units in your army, your energy consumption and energy output, as well as available financial resources. In the upper-right corner you can see groups of units. Tap the radar to open a mini-map. The button in the lower-left corner of the screen opens the system menu. If there are some units selected, the button in the lower-right corener will appear that releases current selection.

If one or more units are selected, the panel showing the number of selected units will appear in the lower-left corner of the screen. If any building is selected, the button for demolition will appear in the lower-left corner of the screen. To move the screen over the map, tap and move it, or simply touch and hold the blue transparent area near the edge of the screen. To open a mini-map tap the radar.

To build the base and produce units you will need money and energy. You will get finance through Command Centers. Each additional Command Center will yield 30 percent less than the previous one. You will also be rewarded for each destroyed hostile unit at 20 percent of its value.

The energy is produced by Generators. Each construction requires energy for its performance. If you are short of energy, the facility is deactivated. We have one Generator but this might prove to be insufficient, so you might want to build another one.

To do so you should tap on the Command Center. On the appearing panel, select Generator. To do it tap and move left/right in any place of the screen or tap the arrows. At the bottom of the panel you can see the value of the construction and energy consumption. Tap on the building icon or on the 'OK' button in the lower-left corner to select construction. Set the construction contour at a blank space on the map and tap on it. A construction process indicator will appear over the site. By the same token you will build one more barracks in order to speed up the preparation process.
On the panel of construction selection you can tap on the 'i' icon in order to get information about the selected construction.

Now we are going to order infantry. Tap on the ready barracks. The panel shows the value for the current type of unit and it's main performance data: attack, armor, speed. Select a type of unit by the left/right arrows or tap and move left/right over the screen in any place. Select their number by the up/down arrows or tap and move up/down over the screen.
You can order more than one unit of each type at once. The order will be executed unit by unit. To launch production, tap the unit's icon or the 'OK' button.
You can indicate a gathering point of trained units. To do so you will have to tap on the flag icon on the unit order panel and then indicate the point on the map.
Point at a unit in order to select it. Tap at a free square  in oder to send the unit there. Tap at a hostile object so as to give the selected unit an order to attack.

To select a group of units just tap with two fingers and extend the box as to cover a number of units, then release. You will be able to see the number of selected units near the cursor. After selection the number of selected units will appear in the lower-left corner.
If you have no selected units, tap-tap in any free place will select all units on the screen.

To save a group hold down the button in the upper-right corner of the screen until the group indicator is bright. In order to activate the saved group, press on the same button shortly. The panel will show the number of units in each of the saved groups. A quick tap-tap on a group button will move the screen to the center of the group.
It was the vanguard of the rebel forces. Now that they know our position they will be mounting more powerful attacks. You will need to strengthen the base defence.
Bunkers and walls serve this purpose as they are heavily armored. We have already built two bunkers but it may be not enough. You might want to build several bunkers to withstand the enemy attacks.
Certain types of units can get to the siege mode.
If one or more units that support the siege mode are selected, the button in the lower-right corner will appear. Press it to activate the siege mode for the selected units.
In the siege mode these units are stationary, so in order to move them one should put them back to the marching mode by pressing the same button once again.
Our base is situated too close to the adversary's base. One cannot be a chooser among the Amazonian Selva.
We have to build all the necessary facilities as soon as possible and be ready to meet the challenge. My guess is the enemy won't take long to show up. Now we have a machine factory.
The rebels are aware of our appearance and are sure to have prepared to meet us. Approaches to their base may be seeded with mines. We should take great care.

missions.briefing: The rebels are aware of our appearance and are sure to have prepared to meet us. Approaches to their base may be seeded with mines. We should take great care.

dialog_after: General, Senator is on the line, sir.

General, I succeeded to talk the Supreme Headquarters into conducting flash spotting of the territory. We've got just one shot so far, but it is enough to realize how serious the treat is. I'm sending you a file.
Received. Opened already. Goodness! I have warned you that without intelligence we are putting our head in the lion's mouth!
I've done everything I could, General...

Ok, we have no time to waste on idle talks. Judging on the shot, there are seven more bases of resistance, and much more serious than the one we've destroyed so far. And from all of them forces started advancement to the moutains a few hours ago. The rebels have deliberately allowed us to go down their territory in order to go over the Andes unchecked.

I'm afraid you're damn right. We believe that their main objective is Lima, the capital of Peru, and the neighbouring major port Callao. We cannot allow the rebels to get to the sea. Supposedly, their columns will go through Uanuco. This is the shortest way to Lima. You must get there earlier than the rebels.
We will do everything possible, Senator.

Don't waste your time, General. The Space Control Center has already allocated several satellites. Soon we will have the most clear picture of what is going on. The Supreme Headquarters has realized how serious the situation is. We are going to get reinforcement, but no one would bet it will arrive before you get into action. That is why you'll have to play it off the cuff and fight to the last ditch. Good luck to you, General!
Captain Rogers's asking to put him through at once.
We are marching out, Senator. Clear. Put me through to Rogers.

General, the officers captured in the operation gave away that the rebellion leader Miguel Monteros is on the Northern base of the rebels, near Tiruntan village. The Base is situated on a river bank, on marshy lands, and is well guarded. We're much more likely to draw Miguel out into our hands than to restrain this huge army.

It is not wise to rely on this untrustworthy information. It can be another catch, in order to lure us deeper. We should split up. The main force will advance to the West, to the mountains, and you, captain, with a group of infantry, will carry out the capture operation.

Now the machine factory and technology center are available to you. Ordering machines and research is similar to ordering infantry. Description of the research is available through tapping 'i' on the research panel.
We have reached the destination. We deploy the base. The terrain is forbidding for our heavy equipment. We shall manage with infantry alone.
Act with discretion, but without delay. We will be expecting your report. Clear, captain!

missions.briefing: Act with discretion, but without delay. We will be expecting your report. Clear, captain!

General, I succeeded to talk the Supreme Headquarters into conducting flash spotting of the territory. We've got just one shot so far, but it is enough to realize how serious the treat is. I'm sending you a file.

Captain Rogers's asking to put him through at once.
We are marching out, Senator. Clear. Put me through to Rogers.

General, the officers captured in the operation gave away that the rebellion leader Miguel Monteros is on the Northern base of the rebels, near Tiruntan village. The Base is situated on a river bank, on marshy lands, and is well guarded. We're much more likely to draw Miguel out into our hands than to restrain this huge army.

It is not wise to rely on this untrustworthy information. It can be another catch, in order to lure us deeper. We should split up. The main force will advance to the West, to the mountains, and you, captain, with a group of infantry, will carry out the capture operation.

Now the machine factory and technology center are available to you. Ordering machines and research is similar to ordering infantry. Description of the research is available through tapping 'i' on the research panel.
We have reached the destination. We deploy the base. The terrain is forbidding for our heavy equipment. We shall manage with infantry alone.
dialog_after: General, the base headquarters has been destroyed, sir, but Miguel was not spotted. He must have managed to escape along the river, while we were storming the base.
We should have foreseen it. It was a put-up-job, to side-track our attention. Move to Uanuco. Every man counts. We are waiting for your! Clear.
Natali, get in touch with the vangard and report the situation. We are approaching the point of destination. We are within a few kilometers of the city.
Cannon establish communication, no response...
...just succeeded to establish connection! I could hear shots and then the connection failed... We could only overhear something about a mine field and a picket.
Which means we are being expected here. All units! Get ready for action!

missions.briefing: Which means we are being expected here. All units! Get ready for action!
dialog_before: General, the base headquarters has been destroyed, sir, but Miguel was not spotted. He must have managed to escape along the river, while we were storming the base.
We should have foreseen it. It was a put-up-job, to side-track our attention. Move to Uanuco. Every man counts. We are waiting for your! Clear.
Natali, get in touch with the vangard and report the situation. We are approaching the point of destination. We are within a few kilometers of the city.
Cannon establish communication, no response...
...just succeeded to establish connection! I could hear shots and then the connection failed... We could only overhear something about a mine field and a picket.
dialog_after: Natali, put me through to Senator.
Senator's on the line.
Senator, we reached the position on schedule. The rebels' outpost has been destroyed, we are undertaking the defence and getting ready to confront the main forces of the enemy. Got any news?

...Only bad news. We've just got some new satellite shots. Resistance forces have arrived at Uanuco from the South. We didn't expect them. You're closed on both sides and the army of rebels is rushing at you. Our reinforcement has started marshing from Lima. Stand on the defensive and fight to the last ditch.

missions.briefing: ...Only bad news. We've just got some new satellite shots. Resistance forces have arrived at Uanuco from the South. We didn't expect them. You're closed on both sides and the army of rebels is rushing at you. Our reinforcement has started marshing from Lima. Stand on the defensive and fight to the last ditch.
objectives: - Hold on till the arrival of reinforcement.
dialog_before: Natali, put me through to Senator.
Senator's on the line.
Senator, we reached the position on schedule. The rebels' outpost has been destroyed, we are undertaking the defence and getting ready to confront the main forces of the enemy. Got any news?
dialog_after: General, have you ordered reinforcement? Meet the highlanders!
How did you menage to get here?
We've made a tour of the mountains. There is a good view of the Gorge from above. The rebels are swarming. If the reinforcement fails to get here in time, we won't be able to hold out.
We will fight to the last ditch and hope for the best!
General, reinforcement is on the line. They report that the forces of rebels in Uanuco have been smashed. The first reinforcement units will soon arrive.
Good job! They haven't let us down! Now we will last!
General, the rebels have stopped their offensive.We've broken their plans by defeating their forces at Uanuco.
General, congratulations! Only a great military leader could held out in a battle like this. You proved your superiority!

The time has not come yet to celebrate the victory. Rebels won't surrender. We found out the location of the main base. The latest satellite shots show that the rebels are in retreat and they have blocked the Gorge that leads to it. Here they will be standing to the last drop of blood. You're to breach their defensives, whatever it takes. This is the only route.
We can look into the Torrent multiple rocket launcher system. In the siege mode, it is effective against long-range enemy units. This will considerably reinforce our defence.
In order to put the selected Torrent MRLS into the siege mode, press the appearing button in the lower-left corner of the screen. Repeat the procedure to reverse to the marching mode.

The reconnaissance team reports that the adversary base is located north-wards. It is well fortified. Routes of approach are mine studded. It will be difficult to make our way through such a defensive. The enemy keeps on receiving reinforcement from the main base.
It is essential to organize a solid defense as fast as one can and launch the offensive. We can use Torrent MRLS to clear the minefields.

missions.briefing: It is essential to organize a solid defense as fast as one can and launch the offensive. We can use Torrent MRLS to clear the minefields.
dialog_before: General, have you ordered reinforcement? Meet the highlanders!
How did you menage to get here?

We will fight to the last ditch and hope for the best!

Good job! They haven't let us down! Now we will last!
General, the rebels have stopped their offensive.We've broken their plans by defeating their forces at Uanuco.
General, congratulations! Only a great military leader could held out in a battle like this. You proved your superiority!

The time has not come yet to celebrate the victory. Rebels won't surrender. We found out the location of the main base. You're to breach their defensives, whatever it takes. This is the only route.
We can look into the Torrent multiple rocket launcher system. In the siege mode, it is effective against long-range enemy units. This will considerably reinforce our defence.
In order to put the selected Torrent MRLS into the siege mode, press the appearing button in the lower-left corner of the screen. Repeat the procedure to reverse to the marching mode.

The reconnaissance team reports that the adversary base is located north-wards. It is well fortified. Routes of approach are mine studded. It will be difficult to make our way through such a defensive. The enemy keeps on receiving reinforcement from the main base.
dialog_after: The time of the decisive battle has come, General! The rebels seem to have summoned all the remaining forces they have to protect their main base. A reinforcement is being pulled up to you but you've got to take immediate action.
Absolutely, Senator! We are ready to fight and put an end to this mutiny.

missions.briefing: Absolutely, Senator! We are ready to fight and put an end to this mutiny.
dialog_before: The time of the decisive battle has come, General! The rebels seem to have summoned all the remaining forces they have to protect their main base. A reinforcement is being pulled up to you but you've got to take immediate action.
dialog_after: The reinforcement has arrived and is waiting for your orders.
Natali, put me through to Senator.
Yes, sir! Senator is on the line.

Mr. Senator, mission accomplished. The enemy base has been destroyed. We captured several rebel leaders, and Miguel Monteros is among them. The rest were able to escape and hide in the mountenous jungle. Squads were dispatched to intercept them but failed to overtake them.

Good job, General! Your mission's been accomplished. The main Peacekeeping forces of the Confederation will carry on. The spirit and valor you displayed in this operation will be rewarded by the Senate of Confederation and all your people will be nominated for awards.
Hurray for the Confederation!
